summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CPKC Rail Risk Intelligence Dashboard - all backend APIs and frontend components working correctly
passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints (health, stats, provinces, incidents data, models, prediction)
Dark theme (#0D1117) applied correctly across all pages
Left sidebar navigation with 4 nav items working
Executive Dashboard with stat cards, charts, and province table
Deep Dive Explorer with 4 tabs (Geographic, Temporal, Correlation, Typology)
Model Command Center with leaderboard, ROC curves, and feature importance
Live Risk Assessor with form inputs, cargo/season chips, and prediction functionality
Risk prediction generates gauge chart, contributions, and recommendations
Mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu and collapsible sidebar
All interactive elements (buttons, dropdowns, sliders, chips) working correctly
